title: Animal Carcinogenicity prediction according to OECD Test No. 451
description:
The endpoint predicted by this model is Animal Carcinogenicity. The dataset used for modeling was obtained from the Carcinogenic Potency Database (CPDB), which contains long-term study results for over 1,500 chemical substances on rodent (mouse and rat) species. Carcinogenicity is defined through the OECD Test No. 451. Each author in the literature evaluated the tissue-tumor combination of the chemical substance and gave their opinion on carcinogenicity, which was assessed from NCI/NTP. In the dataset:
Carcinogenic chemicals are labeled as 1.
Non-carcinogenic chemicals are labeled as 0.
creator: https://ror.org/03cx6bg69
